amdp-hana-028.interviewScriptHinglish: Sir, AMDP transport karna ek careful sequencing exercise hai. Class transport ke saath HANA stored procedure automatically regenerate hoti hai target system mein. Dependencies — CDS views jo USING mein hain — pehle transport hone chahiye. Pre-transport checklist mein code review, unit tests, performance baseline, rollback plan sab include karte hain. Practically, mere project mein 8 AMDPs transport karne the — STMS mein sequence prepare ki: pehle CDS views, fir AMDP classes, fir consumer programs. Production mein activation smoothly hua. Iska benefit yeh hai ki structured transport process se production deployment confident aur safe hota hai aur dependency-related failures avoid hote hain.
amdp-hana-028.interviewScriptEnglish: Transporting AMDP requires careful sequencing because the underlying HANA stored procedure regenerates automatically when the class activates in the target system. Dependencies — particularly CDS views and other AMDPs listed in the USING clause — must travel and activate first. A pre-transport checklist includes peer code review, ABAP Unit results, performance baseline, transport sequence diagram, and a rollback plan. STMS controls the transport order across DEV, QA, and PRD. We monitor activation logs post-import and roll back via a prepared reverse transport if issues appear. The business value is predictable releases, fewer production outages, and traceable change management.

wordByWordSamjho.meaning: Transport Management System orchestrating object movement
Step in target system that compiles ABAP and generates HANA stored procedure
Prepared reverse change ready to restore prior state
CDS view or other AMDP listed in USING that must arrive first
Defined gating items before approving the transport

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Transporting AMDP before its dependent CDS view
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Activation fails in the target system because the view is missing
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Sequence CDS views first, then AMDP classes, then consumer programs

commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Production outage cannot be quickly reverted if the change fails
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Prepare a reverse transport and validate it in QA before go-live

commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Silent activation failures lead to runtime errors days later
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Review SE09/STMS import logs and re-activate any failed object

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Treating AMDP transport like a pure ABAP change
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Misses HANA-side stored procedure regeneration and DCL dependencies
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Include HANA-side checks in the transport runbook and post-import smoke tests

amdp-hana-028.quickRevisionNotes:
What: Process and checklist for safely transporting AMDP changes across landscapes.

Used for:
- Release management for AMDP and dependent CDS
- Change approval governance
- Recovery planning when transports fail

Key syntax / tables / Tcodes:
- STMS for transport orchestration
- SE09/SE10 for transport requests
- Sequence: CDS -> AMDP -> consumers
- Pre-transport checklist with rollback plan

Interview keyword: sequence dependencies, plan rollback

amdp-hana-029.interviewScriptHinglish: Sir, AMDP aur HANA optimization interview mein interviewer teen cheezein test karta hai — concept clarity, real project experience, aur problem-solving approach. AMDP ko ek non-technical manager ko bhi simple language mein explain karna aana chahiye — 'database pe kaam karne wala ABAP method jisse Fiori reports fast chalte hain'. Biggest learning honestly bolo, slowness scenarios pe diagnostic approach batao. Practically, mere project mein finance director ko AMDP migration justify karna tha — humne before-after metrics dikhaye aur OPEX savings calculate kiye. Iska benefit yeh hai ki technical aur business sides dono clearly handle kar pao, jo senior consultant role ke liye essential hai.
amdp-hana-029.interviewScriptEnglish: AMDP and HANA optimization interview questions test concept clarity, project experience, and problem-solving instinct. Be ready to explain AMDP to a non-technical manager — a database-side ABAP method that makes Fiori reports faster. Share your biggest learning, perhaps about debugging or production tuning, with concrete examples. Discuss what you do when an AMDP is slower than expected — typically capture PlanViz, refresh statistics, inspect intermediate tabular variables. Show ecosystem breadth: CDS, calculation views, RAP, and analytics. The business value of broad coverage is positioning yourself as a senior ABAP-on-HANA professional who can both build and communicate.

wordByWordSamjho.meaning: Operational expense reduction often used to justify HANA work
Comparative number capturing improvement after optimization
Structured method for investigating performance issues
HANA modeling artifact complementary to AMDP and CDS

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Speaking only in technical terms to a manager interviewer
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Loses business audience and fails to demonstrate communication skill
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Translate AMDP value into faster reports, lower cost, real-time decisions

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Failing to articulate a clear biggest learning
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Signals lack of reflection on past work
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Pick one specific lesson, why it mattered, and what you do differently now

commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Reduces credibility because claims cannot be evaluated
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Cite actual response times, dataset sizes, and tools used to measure

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Ignoring related concepts such as CDS, RAP, and calculation views
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Reveals narrow exposure and may close doors to wider roles
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Bring up adjacent topics naturally and connect them to AMDP work

amdp-hana-029.quickRevisionNotes:
What: Interview wrap-up topics for AMDP and HANA optimization roles.

Used for:
- Demonstrating senior-level breadth and communication
- Manager and architect round preparation
- Story-building around real project lessons

Key syntax / tables / Tcodes:
- Plain-language analogy for non-technical managers
- Diagnostic chain: PlanViz, statistics, tabular variables
- Before-after metrics with units and tooling reference
- CDS, RAP, calculation views as ecosystem topics

Interview keyword: clarity, evidence, ecosystem awareness

amdp-hana-030.interviewScriptHinglish: Sir, support escalation matlab production mein issue hai aur business affected hai. AMDP failure pe pehla check transport history ka, fir input data anomalies, fir HANA-level resource pressure. Escalation chain hoti hai L1, L2, L3, vendor — har level pe handover document karte hain. Stakeholders ko regular updates dete hain. Workaround ke through service quickly restore karte hain. Practically, mere project mein AMDP suddenly fail hone laga — recent transport ne column type change kiya tha. Hum L2 mein issue contain kiya, workaround ke roop mein previous version restore ki, L3 mein root cause fix kiya. Iska benefit yeh hai ki structured escalation se downtime minimised hota hai aur business continuity protect hoti hai.
amdp-hana-030.interviewScriptEnglish: Support escalation handles production issues that exceed first-line resolution. For an AMDP failure, the initial checks cover recent transports, input data anomalies, and HANA resource pressure visible in HANA Cockpit. The escalation chain typically runs L1 to L2 to L3 and on to SAP if needed, with structured handoffs documented at each step. Stakeholders receive regular status updates and impact estimates. A workaround such as reverting to a previous version restores service while the root cause is fixed. After resolution, a post-mortem identifies preventive actions. The business value is minimised downtime, transparent communication, and continuous improvement of operational maturity.

wordByWordSamjho.meaning: Defined sequence of support levels for incident handoff
Temporary fix restoring service while root cause is addressed
Investigation method identifying the underlying problem source
Monitoring tool for HANA resources and statement statistics
Blameless review after resolution to capture lessons learned

commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Next level wastes time gathering basic information
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Collect ST05 traces, dump details, HANA Cockpit snapshots before escalating

commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Loss of trust and pressure escalates from business side
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Provide regular status updates, expected timelines, and current workarounds

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Skipping workaround in favour of waiting for root cause fix
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Extends downtime even when service can be restored quickly
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Restore service with safe workaround first, then fix root cause in parallel

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Not performing a post-mortem after resolution
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Loses the lesson; similar incidents recur
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Document timeline, root cause, and preventive actions; share across team

amdp-hana-030.quickRevisionNotes:
What: Structured escalation and resilience process for AMDP production incidents.

Used for:
- Severity-driven incident response
- Maintaining business continuity during outages
- Continuous improvement of operational maturity

Key syntax / tables / Tcodes:
- L1->L2->L3->vendor escalation chain
- ST22, HANA Cockpit, ST05 for diagnostic capture
- Workaround patterns: revert transport, fallback report
- Blameless post-mortem template

Interview keyword: contain quickly, fix correctly, learn always

amdp-hana-031.interviewScriptHinglish: Sir, FS — Functional Specification — mein business requirements likhi hoti hain: kya output chahiye, kaun use karega, kab tak chahiye. AMDP design karne se pehle FS se data volume, response time SLA, authorization model, aur consumer pattern samajhte hain. TS — Technical Specification — mein convert karte hain: AMDP class aur method signature, IMPORTING/EXPORTING parameters, SQLScript pseudocode, USING dependencies, authorization wrapper design, test cases, transport sequence. Practically, mere project mein finance migration FS se 15 AMDPs design ki, har ek ka TS sign-off liya pehle development se. Iska benefit yeh hai ki requirements technical solution se traceable rehte hain aur post-go-live audit smoothly pass hota hai.
amdp-hana-031.interviewScriptEnglish: Functional Specification captures business requirements: outputs, users, frequencies, SLAs, and compliance constraints. When designing an AMDP solution, we extract data volume, response time SLA, authorization model, and consumer pattern from the FS, then translate them into a Technical Specification. The TS covers class and method signatures, IMPORTING and EXPORTING parameters, SQLScript pseudocode, USING dependencies, authorization wrapper design, error handling, test cases, and transport sequence. We obtain stakeholder sign-off on the TS before development begins. This traceability between FS and TS supports audit reviews and avoids scope drift. The business value is alignment, governance, and predictable delivery.

wordByWordSamjho.meaning: Technical Specification translating FS into implementation design
Service Level Agreement defining target response time or availability
Formal approval from stakeholder before development begins
Mapping linking requirements to design and tests for audit

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Starting AMDP development without a TS
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Misses authorization, performance, and dependency considerations
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Always produce a TS derived from the FS and obtain sign-off before coding

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Skipping data volume analysis from FS in TS
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Solution may fail performance SLA at production volumes
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Capture expected row counts and growth in TS to justify pushdown design

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Documenting authorization design as an afterthought
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Security gaps surface during audit or penetration testing
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Define AUTHORITY-CHECK objects and MANDT handling in the TS upfront

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Omitting test cases and transport sequence from TS
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Causes ad-hoc testing and transport failures later
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Include test scenarios, expected results, and dependency-ordered transport plan

amdp-hana-031.quickRevisionNotes:
What: Mapping from Functional Specification to Technical Specification for AMDP-based solutions.

Used for:
- Requirement-to-design traceability
- Governance and audit compliance
- Predictable delivery and clear sign-off gates

Key syntax / tables / Tcodes:
- TS sections: signature, USING, SQLScript pseudocode, authorization, errors, tests, transport
- Reference SLAs and volumes from FS
- Stakeholder sign-off ritual before development

Interview keyword: FS in, TS out, traceability throughout
